scripts.pc: bun run fmt && bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run build
scripts.example:basic: SPOTIFY_EFFECT_TRACE=1 OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT=http://127.0.0.1:14318 bun run --filter spotify-effect build && SPOTIFY_EFFECT_TRACE=1 OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT=http://127.0.0.1:14318 bun run examples/basic/src/main.ts
scripts.example:browser: SPOTIFY_EFFECT_TRACE=1 OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT=http://127.0.0.1:14318 bun run --filter spotify-effect build && SPOTIFY_EFFECT_TRACE=1 OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT=http://127.0.0.1:14318 bun run --filter @examples/browser dev
scripts.example:sveltekit: SPOTIFY_EFFECT_TRACE=1 OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT=http://127.0.0.1:14318 bun run --filter spotify-effect build && SPOTIFY_EFFECT_TRACE=1 OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT=http://127.0.0.1:14318 bun run --filter @examples/sveltekit dev -- --port 3012 --host 127.0.0.1
